assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 13-15 show the exact JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 4.4.2 (lines 26-28): "TC-8022's summary contains `(rhtpa-2.1)`, which matches the current issue's stream scope `[rhtpa-2.1]` (stream 2.1.x). **Match confirmed**: TC-8022 is a preemptive remediation task for this CVE and this stream." The filtering explicitly checks the task summary for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 4.4.3a (lines 36-43) shows: "jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend")". The text also states: "This establishes TC-8022 as a standard remediation task for TC-8021, using the same 'Depend' link type used for all remediation task linkage."

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md section 4.4.3b (lines 48-58) shows labels updated from [ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive] to [ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123] via jira.edit_issue. Explicitly states: "The `security-preemptive` label is removed because TC-8022 is now linked to a proper CVE Jira (TC-8021) for its stream. It is no longer a preemptive task -- it is a standard remediation task."

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md Step 8 section (lines 56-58): "**No new remediation tasks created.** Because Step 4.4 reconciled the existing preemptive task TC-8022, remediation for stream 2.1.x is already covered. Step 8 skips task creation for this stream." Also confirmed in reconciliation.md line 76: "Step 8 will skip task creation for this stream."
